decisions.title_en: Greg Abel debuts at first Berkshire AGM without Buffett on stage; deepfake Buffett opens Q&A as cyber-risk demo
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Major Saturday May 2 event — first annual meeting with Greg Abel as CEO, Buffett deepfake used to demo AI cybersecurity risk, Abel cautious AI stance ('not for the sake of AI').

decisions.title_en: Families of Tumbler Ridge Canada school shooting victims sue OpenAI; safety team had flagged shooter, leadership overruled
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. florida-ag-openai-criminal-probe (4/27 lookback) is a different jurisdiction (US state AG criminal) and different cases (FSU/USF). This is a Canadian civil wrongful-death lawsuit over the Feb 2026 Tumbler Ridge mass shooting where OpenAI safety team allegedly recommended calling police but leadership overruled.

decisions.title_en: SoftBank planning $100B US IPO for new AI+robotics spin-out 'Roze' to build data centers with autonomous robots
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. SoftBank planning to spin out Roze (AI + robotics including ABB Robotics) at $100B target valuation, focused on data center construction automation. Distinct from spacex-ai-first-ipo-filing (4/24).

decisions.title_en: Axios scoop: White House drafting executive order to walk back Anthropic blacklist for agencies to access Mythos
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Distinct from anthropic-mythos-nsa-microsoft (5/1, which covered NSA usage + Pentagon CTO confirmation). This is a separate angle: White House actively drafting an EO to bypass Anthropic supply chain risk designation, holding 'table reads' with companies. New policy development.

decisions.title_en: Legora hits $5.55B Series D led by Accel + $50M Nvidia extension — Sweden-based legal AI tripled valuation in 5 months, takes on Harvey
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Different from manifest-os-legal-ai-series-a (4/28, Series A $60M). This is a Series D at $5.55B for Sweden's Legora, plus Nvidia-led $50M extension; competes head-to-head with Harvey ($11B).

decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. event_date 2026-04-28 is exactly 5 days old (within freshness limit). IBM Bob entered GA April 28 after starting with 100 IBM developers in summer 2025, now used by 80,000 IBM employees. Multi-model routing notable.

decisions.title_en: Salesforce launches Agentforce Operations to extend agentic AI from front office to back office (compliance / onboarding / approvals)
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. New Salesforce product extending Agentforce beyond CRM/front-office to back-office (process coordination, compliance, audits), claims 50-70% cycle time reduction, built on Regrello acquisition. GA on April 29.

decisions.title_en: Huawei guides AI chip revenue to $12B in 2026 (+60% YoY) as DeepSeek V4 deployment + NVIDIA China stall drive Ascend 950 demand
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. FT broke the $12B 2026 chip revenue forecast (60% growth from $7.5B in 2025) on April 30. Linked to but distinct from deepseek-v4-release (4/25 lookback) — that was the model launch, this is the supply-side revenue impact.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI revokes macOS app certificate after Axios JS supply-chain compromise; mandates update by May 8 or apps stop working
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. April 29 OpenAI urgent alert: malicious axios package was used by macOS app build pipeline, certificate compromised; ChatGPT Desktop, Codex, Codex-cli, Atlas all affected; mandatory update before May 8 or apps will be blocked.

decisions.title_en: Week 1 wrap-up: Musk testimony dominates first week of Musk v. Altman trial in Oakland
decisions.reason: Already published 5/1 with title 'Musk v. Altman 庭审第一周收官...' covering Musk testimony conclusion, Birchall off-limits answer, Brockman scheduled Monday. May 2 CNBC piece is a recap of week 1 with no substantively new information beyond what was already published.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI reworks Stargate strategy — abandons first-party datacenters in favor of leased compute deals

The 'abandoning first-party datacenters' angle is also subsumed by 4/27 microsoft-openai-partnership-restructure which already established OpenAI's pivot to multi-cloud leased compute.
